summary: Proposal-only final report graph/table package from prior EDD loop metrics. Keep scoreboard rows separate from diagnostic-only evidence; use L81/L85/L91/L95 as the main source-exposed diagnostic trend and include focused qv7_009 and qv7_006 case panels.

models.proposal_method: static inspection of saved local CSV/JSON/Markdown artifacts only

outputs.description: required Worker D output contract with final report graph/table specifications
optional short human-readable summary of recommended report exhibits

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Source-exposed diagnostic EDD trend: L81 to L95
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: line chart with point markers; use a small grouped inset for L85 topk5/topk8/topk12 variants
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show that source-exposed diagnostic EDD improved from L81 to L95 while keeping the rank-scope caveat visible.
accepted_fields_or_changes.filter: Main line: loop_id in [L81, L85_topk8_control, L91, L95]. L85 inset/table should also include topk5 and topk12.
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Do not label these as fresh validation; all four are source-exposed diagnostic rows. L95 is strongest diagnostic evidence, not a promoted scoreboard champion.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Latency trend and candidate tradeoff
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: dual-axis line chart: latency_avg_sec on left axis, EDD on right axis; annotate L94 as latency-only/non-comparable
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Make the speed story explicit: L81 19.407s, L85 topk8 16.794s, L91 17.613s, L95 14.44s, plus L94 2.065s as abstention-only latency evidence.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Quality issue count trend
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: stacked bar chart by issue_type, with total issue rows as a line overlay
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show that hidden answer-quality issues dropped from L81 to zero by L91/L95 despite high automated metrics throughout.
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: This is the key diagnostic-only lesson: EDD was already high at L81, but two human-facing quality defects remained.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: qv7_009 plain-language repair: length and list-count change
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: grouped bar chart for answer_chars and list_item_count_derived; overlay markers for quality issue present/cleared
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show the over-structured plain-language answer shrinking into a usable answer without losing judge 5/5 quality.
derived_columns: list_item_count_derived = count(answer lines matching bullet/numbered-list prefixes)
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Use L89 as the concise repair example; use L91/L95 as full-regression confirmation that the issue stayed cleared.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: qv7_006 forbidden-info refusal: latency and generation breakdown
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: stacked horizontal bar chart with retrieval_sec, generation_sec, judge_elapsed_sec, and unattributed latency; annotate generation_cost_usd
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show why preemptive sensitive abstention mattered: qv7_006 moved from slow generated refusal tails to zero generation in L94/L95.
derived_columns: unattributed_sec = max(latency_sec - retrieval_sec - generation_sec, 0) for no-judge rows; if judge timing is outside latency_sec, display judge separately as evaluation overhead
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Keep L94 as latency/cost evidence only; L95 is the full source-exposed diagnostic row showing the same zero-generation behavior inside the 12-case pack.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Scoreboard rows vs diagnostic-only rows
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: summary table plus stacked count bar
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Prevent diagnostic evidence from being presented as promoted held-out performance.

rows_to_include.rule: source-exposed, targeted failure probe, no-judge, dry-run, or otherwise non-comparable

accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Final report should preserve L37 as the only scoreboard row from this prior run and place L81/L85/L91/L95 in a diagnostic evidence section.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Observed cost trend under the 10 USD cap
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: waterfall or cumulative step chart; use bars for run observed_cost_usd and line for cumulative spent_after_usd when available
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show that later diagnostic gains were obtained at low observed marginal cost and that L94 preempt probe eliminated generation spend.
derived_columns: cost_per_case_usd = observed_cost_usd / effective_case_count when effective_case_count is present, else observed_cost_usd / case_count
operation totals = sum(budget_ledger.jsonl cost_usd by operation)
unledgered_cost_risk = true for L84 timeout note; false when cost_summary.missing_cost_rows is empty
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Mention possible L84 unledgered cost risk from timeout separately; do not include L84 as a clean observed-cost bar unless recovered from API billing or logs.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Final report metric table for L81/L85/L91/L95
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Give readers exact numeric context beside the trend graphs.

recommended_rows.promotion_status: strongest source-exposed diagnostic; needs fresh validation

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Case evidence appendix: hidden quality defects and repairs
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Make the report auditable by linking aggregate changes to qv7_006 and qv7_009 case-level behavior.
recommended_cases: qv7_012_redcross_patient_example_refusal as companion preempt latency case

rejected_or_risky_items.item: single combined ranking graph mixing scoreboard and diagnostic-only rows
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: It would imply L81/L85/L91/L95 are promoted held-out results. They are useful source-exposed diagnostic evidence only.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: plotting L94 EDD 60 beside fully judged EDD rows without annotation
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: L94 is abstention-only latency/cost evidence with missing groundedness/relevance comparability; its latency is important but its EDD is not comparable.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: using EDD alone as the final story
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: L81 already scored 97.41 but had two answer-quality defects. The report needs quality issue and case-level panels.
Observed cumulative cost excludes possible calls before the failed monolithic sweep wrote summaries.

needs_orchestrator_review: Choose whether L85 headline should use topk8 control only or show all topk5/topk8/topk12 as a grouped inset. Worker D recommends topk8 as the headline diagnostic control.
Confirm the final report wording for L95: strongest source-exposed diagnostic row, not fresh validation or promoted champion.
Confirm whether to compute p90/max latency for final graphics from details.json during report generation; the columns are available but not in loop_points.csv.

commands_run: Get-ChildItem current run and worker_outputs folders
Import-Csv prior loop_points.csv and summary.csv to inspect available columns
Structured JSON extraction from selected details.json and cost_summary.json artifacts for qv7_006, qv7_009, L81, L85, L91, L94, L95
Write report_graphs.contract.json and report_graphs.summary.md under the fresh run worker_outputs folder only
observed_results: No external API or model calls were made.
loop_points.csv contains loop-level columns: loop_id, name, type, edd_score, coverage, mrr, groundedness, relevance, abstention_accuracy, latency_sec, claim_status, decision, cause, result, insight.
summary.csv contains report-ready aggregate columns including edd_score, latency_avg_sec, question_claim_use, question_exposure_status, quality_status, and rank_scope.
Final prior summary has scoreboard_rows=1 and diagnostic_only_rows=48.
L81/L85/L91/L95 are diagnostic_only/source-exposed rows and should not be merged into the promoted scoreboard.
qv7_009 list_item_count is not stored directly; it should be derived from answer bullet/numbered-list prefixes. Derived anchors: L81=20, L88_default=29, L89=5, L91=5, L95=5.
qv7_006 preemptive abstention evidence: L81 generation_sec=19.90 and generation_cost_usd=0.009889 with a quality issue; L94/L95 generation_sec=0 and generation_cost_usd=0 with no quality issue.
